questions.question_text: Answer the following questions CO Mapping a Differentiate between Native Apps vs Hybrid Apps b Differentiate between Mobile Operating Systems and Desktop OS c What are the salient features of Eclipse Simulator and how is it useful for App development? d Write a short notes on Event handling with the example code? e Write a short notes on Common Android APIs with the example code? f Briefly explain Cloud Storage for app development w.r.t any program or application g WAP to display your name, class, university through any mobile app h How do you publish mobile applications and explain
Explain the tool chain or Integrated Development Environment used for Mobile Application Development with neat diagram , input and output of each tool or software w.r.t any example of a program
What is SDKs, different components of it and explain its architecture w.r.t any platform with neat diagram
WAP to display weather information to the registered user in android platform along with any five UI components [ Make your own assumptions of the APP]
WAP to display patient information to the doctor in android platform along with graphics services and layer animations [ Make your own assumptions of the APP]
Explain the Android OS Layered Architecture with neat diagram and WAP to demonstrate use of any Android API’s with any application
Explain the Android User Interface Design Essentials w.r.t any application design with the proper code. How do you publish the same in Android App Store?
Consider the Q4. You have to test and deploy the developed application. Devise the complete methodology for testing, deployment and publishing in android environment
Consider the Q5. You have to test and deploy the developed application. Devise the complete methodology for testing, deployment and publishing in iOS/ Windows/ any other cross development environment
